{{Quote|Hey, man, clear out. Your cramping my style with the ladies.|Viglo to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Viglo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sith officer|officer]] who served [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3956 BBY]], he was stationed on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]], where he passed the time getting drunk and spending his time with women. While he didn't hide his distaste for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and Manaan, he didn't seem as uptight as other Sith officers, remarking that he just wanted to "have a couple of drinks and try to unwind."

==Behind the scenes==
In the game, Viglo will only converse with the player if [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] is a [[Gender/Legends|female]]. If Revan is a man, Viglo tells the male Revan to back off because he's "cramping his style with the ladies". Upon closing the conversation as a female Revan, he will make a drunken attempt to flirt before requesting another drink from the [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] barkeep.

==Appearances==
